problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Spintronics. Spintronics for low-power data storage directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
